subcodes.first_line: O thou wondrous branch of the blessed Tree! Although for some time, according to God's consummate wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع البدیع من السدره المبارکه اگرچه چندیست نظر بحکمت بالغه الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
